name: Finch
description: '''Finch''' is an American [[rock music|rock]] band from [[Temecula, California|Temecula]], [[California]]. The band is best known for their single "[[What It Is to Burn (song)|What It Is to Burn]]" from the [[What It Is to Burn|album of the same name]] (2002). Their second album, ''[[Say Hello to Sunshine]]'' (2005), peaked within the top 30 on the [[Billboard 200|''Billboard'' 200]]. Following setbacks within the group, they released the album ''[[Back to Oblivion]]'' (2014).
